LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO' UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED AS WELL AS A SEPARATE PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: SUZANNE BOLANOS, CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/SRB)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2022 Continued To May-25-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgement
Off Calendar Mar-18-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PRECILA BALABBO'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgement.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed as well as a separate proposed judgment.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/SRB)
